revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿三]][[zh:七月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿三]][[zh:七月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿三]][[zh:七月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿三]][[zh:七月廿三]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 23|qq=July 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1069086}} / Year 2 of {{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|qid=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu|1=Kenmu}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 12|en|August 12|qid=Q2777|lt=August 12|1=August 12}} , {{ill|1335|en|1335|qid=Q6011|lt=1335|1=1335}} ) – {{ill|Nakasendai Rebellion|ja|中先代の乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakasendai Rebellion|qq=}} : While imprisoned in Kamakura, {{ill|Prince Moriyoshi|en|Prince Moriyoshi|qid=Q2288858|lt=Prince Moriyoshi|1=Prince Moriyoshi}} was assassinated by {{ill|Ashikaga Tadayoshi|en|Ashikaga Tadayoshi|qid=Q725375|lt=Ashikaga Tadayoshi|1=Ashikaga Tadayoshi}} . * Year 4 of {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} , {{ill|1651|en|1651|qid=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}} ) – {{ill|Keian Uprising|en|Keian Uprising|qid=Q6383559|lt=Keian Uprising|1=Keian Uprising}} : The shogunate discovered a plot by military strategist {{ill|Yui Shōsetsu|en|Yui Shōsetsu|qid=Q8060473|lt=Yui Shōsetsu|1=Yui Shōsetsu}} to overthrow the government. * Year 1 of {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|qid=Q1145295|lt=Manji (Japan)|1=Manji (era)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|1658|en|1658|qid=Q6991|lt=1658|1=1658}} ) – Due to a major fire, the era name changed from {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} to Manji.
== Births == * Year 4 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|1535|en|1535|qid=Q6453|lt=1535|1=1535}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihiro|en|Shimazu Yoshihiro|qid=Q1156288|lt=Shimazu Yoshihiro|1=Shimazu Yoshihiro}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}} of Satsuma (d. {{ill|1619|en|1619|qid=Q6804|lt=1619|1=1619}} ). * Year 7 of {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 4|en|September 4|qid=Q2855|lt=September 4|1=September 4}} , {{ill|1787|en|1787|qid=Q7763|lt=1787|1=1787}} ) – {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|en|Ninomiya Sontoku|qid=Q968964|lt=Ninomiya Sontoku|1=Ninomiya Sontoku}} , agricultural reformer (d. {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Kōda Rohan|en|Kōda Rohan|qid=Q1038466|lt=Kōda Rohan|1=Kōda Rohan}} , novelist (d. {{ill|1947|en|1947|qid=Q5263|lt=1947|1=1947}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}} , {{ill|672|en|672|qid=Q30601|lt=672|1=672}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōbun|en|Emperor Kōbun|qid=Q357242|lt=Emperor Kōbun|1=Emperor Kōbun}} (citation needed), 39th emperor of Japan (b. {{ill|648|en|648|qid=Q30618|lt=648|1=648}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Kyūju|en|Kyūju|qid=Q1194205|lt=Kyūju|1=Kyūju}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}} , {{ill|1155|en|1155|qid=Q19650|lt=1155|1=1155}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Konoe|en|Emperor Konoe|qid=Q373997|lt=Emperor Konoe|1=Emperor Konoe}} , 76th emperor of Japan (b. {{ill|1139|en|1139|qid=Q19608|lt=1139|1=1139}} ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ) – {{ill|Kimenzan Tanigorō|en|Kimenzan Tanigorō|qid=Q6410061|lt=Kimenoyama Tanigorō|1=Kimenzan Tanigorō}} , 13th {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yokozuna|qid=Q1067277}} (b. {{ill|1826|en|1826|qid=Q7004|lt=1826|1=1826}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|22|7|24|6|23|8|7|0723|qq=}}
